channel.title: Oval Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.3.0

  • Realtime transcription — Live captions with sliding window STT (WhisperKit Neural Engine or ONNX). Press Cmd+Shift+T or click the captions button.
  • Speaker diarization — Identify who's speaking with FluidAudio (Pyannote + WeSpeaker). Toggle "Speakers" in the transcription panel.
  • Adaptive voice detection — VAD now auto-calibrates to ambient noise, works for all voice types.
  • Fixed model downloads — Resolved -422 errors, downloads now show progress in MB with a progress bar.
  • WhisperKit CoreML support — WhisperKit models now load correctly on Apple Neural Engine.
  • Updated model catalog — Added Moonshine Base EN and Kokoro EN voice, removed broken URLs.
  • Socket.IO chat streaming — Dual-path streaming (Socket.IO + SSE) for faster responses.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.2.0

  • Sparkle auto-update — Oval now checks for updates automatically and installs them in-app
  • All voice mode improvements from v1.1.0 included

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.1.0

  • Voice mode floating window — ChatGPT-style compact window instead of fullscreen
  • On-device STT/TTS model selection — choose from multiple Whisper and Piper models in Settings
  • Better TTS for chat — play button uses on-device Piper voice instead of macOS system voice
  • Instant TTS stop — stops mid-sentence when you hit stop
  • Auto-update support — Sparkle integration for seamless updates
